name: Modern Resin Bath Canister Wood Top - Threshold™
description:
Keep your bath space look modern and elegant with the Modern Resin Bath Canister with Wood Top from Threshold™. This cream bath canister features a round shape with wood top to help keep the contents covered. Made of resin, this bath canister makes a practical addition to your bath space. Add coordinating soap pump to complete your bathroom decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
